pip_2026-07-22.mp4.title: Pip's Magical Mango Peeler! 🥭
pip_2026-07-22.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #7220: It's National Mango Day! 🥭 I wanted to see if the Mystical Press could help me get to the yummy part faster. The way it peeled itself was so cool! ✨ What kind of fruit should I experiment with next? Let me know! Pip-pip!

#PipsProjects #NationalMangoDay #mango #satisfying #asmr #cute #animation #3D
